pages.title: 力 / 怒
pages.text: $(l)力$() is the low-tier counterattack glyph. The more final damage you take, the more attack power you gain. Wood caps at +20%, iron at +50%, diamond and above at +60%.$(br2)At diamond and above, 力 gains a small shockwave, but it does not provide the damage reduction that 怒 does.

pages.title: 怒: high-tier counter
pages.text: $(l)怒$() needs a diamond or netherite stave. It tracks final damage after all earlier reductions.$(br2)Every 1 point of final damage adds 1% damage reduction, capped at 65% on diamond and 70% on netherite. Every 5 points adds attack power, capped at +125% on diamond and +150% on netherite.

pages.title: Shockwave
pages.text: 怒 releases a shockwave every 10 attacks from entities. It pushes nearby creatures within 4 blocks and deals a small amount of magic damage.$(br2)When 怒 expires or is written again, its damage reduction and attack bonuses reset. Death, leaving the game, or switching saves clears it too.
